text: Prayer can change everything. Prayer is the best armour of the life of faith. Being able to pray itself is grace and ability. Prayer changes us, who are weak, into powerful instruments for God.
author: CHJN

text: It is said that those who overcome become God's children and inherit the new world. Therefore, we must greet God with firm faith and sincerity to receive everything in the new world as our inheritance, rather than worldly material things or things like this.
author: CHJN

text: One of the reasons we must bear fruits is because we need to save them… but also it is for ourselves to be transformed when we bear fruits. Only when we are transformed, we can participate in the First Resurrection. 'Man becoming a god'. Only when a man becomes a divine being, one can live for eternity with God who is a divine being.
author: CHJN

text: We must be reborn of God's spiritual nature and character. We must be completely born again perfectly of the seed of heaven. The very first thing that must be reborn before anything else is our mindset.
author: CHJN

text: What was the first thing Jesus said when He appeared at His second coming? It was, 'Overcome.' The message He emphasized most repeatedly was 'Overcome.' The fact that there is a command to overcome means that there is an opponent to fight against. Thus, when Revelation is fulfilled, there is not only a time of joy and gladness day and night, but also a time of spiritual warfare. Since there is an enemy, a spiritual warfare must take place — that is what it means.
author: CHJN

text: The first thing we must think about is the reason why God chose us at this time — it is because He needs us, and we must keep in mind that we are the Nazirites who have been chosen by God.
author: CHJN

text: Please work hard at evangelism. Evangelism is the most important thing... You can do it if you put your mind to it.
author: CHJN

text: Even if it's just so we may live, we must not distance ourselves from the Word. We must be united with it.
author: CHJN

text: We have to go to the place that is persecuted. Persecutors are with the devil. This is the same in both the Old and New Testaments.
author: CHJN

text: In front of God, you must have the firm determination that you must fulfil the duty that you received. If living together with God forever and ever in the kingdom of heaven is truly your goal, then you must work without wavering. Let us think about God, think about Jesus, think about the martyrs, and then think about our duty in today's time.
author: CHJN

text: I know the will and purpose of God, so deep down joy consoles me. I also remember the path that the prophets, apostles, and Jesus went through. They are with me so I'm joyful.
author: CHJN

text: In order to repay the Lord who has chosen us, we must carry the duties given to us correctly. We must work offering our entire bodies to the Lord on behalf of His kingdom. This is what it means to repay the heavens. With what shall I repay the grace of Jesus who died for me? I will devote all my life and repay his grace with the true way.
author: CHJN

text: Jesus died on the cross to forgive our sins. At the fulfilment of Revelation, Jesus will make those who are forgiven by his blood into a kingdom and priest. Having received such great love from Jesus, let us not persecute but forgive and love one another. Let us teach and learn the truth from each other so that we may all reach heaven together.
author: CHJN

text: Those who find joy in doing God's work experience minimal stress. Working can indeed cause stress, and that's when one should reflect. How much have I prayed? How much gratitude have I shown? Focusing on God's work significantly reduces stress. Stress isn't relieved by worldly methods.
author: CHJN

text: The day when the work of God is fulfilled will surely come and that day is drawing near. Whether this day comes sooner or later is up to us. We must do everything that we can do for the glory of God and the glory of Shincheonji.
author: CHJN

text: Always, as a member of Shincheonji, and as a true believer of God, one of the most important things in fighting and winning the war to preserve our life is our spirit. The matter of spirit is of utmost importance. This is because the first entity one must overcome is oneself. Humans can easily become complacent, and if one doesn't pay attention to oneself, arrogance can sneak in without one even realizing it. We must constantly awaken our spirit to that of the heavenly revelation and overcome this instinct time and again.
author: CHJN

text: Prayer is the best armour of the life of faith. Being able to pray itself is grace and ability. Prayer changes us, who are weak, into powerful instruments for God. If we pray according to God's word we will become the worker who can change the mainstream of history.
author: CHJN

text: I struggle with things inside me to this day. But the attitude I had was 'I'm not going to give up'... I know my true nature is that I don't want to change. My nature is that I want to be comfortable. But what God wants from me is to change little by little, not necessarily in one day. God wants me to put in that effort.
author: CHJN

text: Our situations cannot change the truth about the word, that's why we should be more firm on the words of the Bible.
author: CHJN

text: We must establish a good, natural relationship with the students in order to prevent them from falling. The relationship should not always be about the word. The teacher's heart and the students' heart should become one, like friends, and the word should be taught slowly step by step.
author: CHJN

text: God cannot save all humanity at once. Humanity has been under Satan's control for so long that many refuse to return to God upon hearing his word. God first selects his chosen people and then trains them to be his priests. He gives them the words that will heal all nations.
author: CHJN

text: There is certainly a day when God's work will be fulfilled, and that day is drawing near. Whether this day comes quickly or slowly depends on us. For the glory of God and the glory of the new heaven and new earth, we must do all that we can.
author: CHJN

text: The spirit of the martyrs is the spirit that gave up worldly things and sacrificed life for the will of God. When that spirit is with us, our hearts shift from living for ourselves to living for God. What we must do is prepare our hearts so that the spirit can work freely within. A heart filled with one's own thoughts, pride, and emotions has no room for the spirit to dwell. We must remove the stones and thorns in our hearts — resentment, comparison, complaints, and fear — so that the spirit can move freely.
author: CHJN

text: Looking ahead, it seems there will be very little time left for evangelism. Therefore we must all put our strength into evangelism. Now is the time to evangelise. If we wait a little longer, it will no longer be the right time for evangelism. So let us quickly make the most of this moment and evangelise quickly and well.
author: CHJN

text: Prayer is our strength.
author: CHJN

text: One day you will look back and be so glad that you chose to keep going, even without knowing how everything will turn out. You will be glad you rose above the doubt that your significance was too small, you will be glad that you did not give up and you chose to give your all to God.
author: Fulfilment John

text: Only when a man becomes a divine being, one can live for eternity with God who is a divine being. This is our dream and our hope. But being a divine being doesn't only mean putting in effort. We learned that we need to have divine nature. Faith, goodness, knowledge, self-control, perseverance, godliness, brotherly kindness, love. How many of these nature do I have?
author: CHJN

text: Our duty is to guide believers to heaven, and it is not only about sending believers to heaven; we must also go to heaven ourselves. Therefore, self-education and self-creation are the most important. We must also remember that we bear the responsibility for the lives of the believers. With this in mind, we must pray and dedicate ourselves earnestly to fulfill our duty.
author: CHJN

text: We should be born of this word. If we leave this word, we can't do anything. If we are with this word, we can be with God. Whether we go to a mountain or a field or anywhere, this word can't leave us and we can't leave this word.
author: CHJN

text: All members of Shincheonji must establish their Word skills and stay within the Word. It says, 'Blessed are those who meditate on the Word day and night,' and that 'the Word is life.' Therefore, just as we will die physically if we do not breathe, we will die spiritually if we do not meditate on this word day and night; it is no different than ceasing to breathe.
author: CHJN

text: As one body and one tree, we must completely fulfill our duty so that we can achieve our goal. This is God's hope, our hope, and what it means to complete God's goal and our goal.
author: CHJN

text: It is said that God listens even when two or three people pray. Since all our believers are praying, the power of those prayers reaches Heaven, and everything we do prospers wherever we go. Therefore, let us continue to pray and make every effort tirelessly until the day we achieve our goal.
author: CHJN

text: The prophets and the martyrs are watching us. Let's make Shincheonji and Revelation known so that all the multitude in white come out. The truth that we preach will pave their way. Let's seal the Word into our hearts and pray.
author: CHJN

text: If we unite and push forward together, there is nothing we cannot achieve. We must cooperate to make even the impossible possible.
author: CHJN

text: To enter the kingdom of heaven, one must be born again of the seed of God — the Word that was in the beginning — and enter in the New Testament Revelation.
author: CHJN

text: Opportunities and time will not always be available. We must fulfill the entrusted duty before the time is over. If you have seen the work, think like lightning on how you can accomplish that work.
author: CHJN

text: Even though a problem may seem impossible to solve or like it will not work out, the one who makes it work is God. Everything must be gained through hardships to understand their value.
author: CHJN

text: Let us never forget, even for a moment, how CHJN has run this race from the time he was chosen until now, devoting his entire life only to God's work. The one and only reason is because it is God's work. We must make sure that the heart of the shepherd and our hearts are connected, and that God's heart can become our heart.
author: CHJN

text: Wherever you are, whatever you are doing, you are Heaven. You must never forget this. Wherever we are and whatever we are doing the Heavens will protect those who have faith and we are those who must complete the kingdom of Heaven. This is the reason why God chose us. Don't ever forget this truth.
author: CHJN

text: The era of Revelation begins only when the Book of Revelation is fulfilled, and today is that very time. When one receives and eats the book that God and Jesus bring in their hands, it becomes the food that gives eternal life. The destination of believers today is the paradise world of eternal life in Revelation 21, and eternal life is fulfilled when God comes bringing heaven and the food of eternal life.
author: CHJN

text: We do not evangelize to achieve a goal, but because it is the way to receive salvation in the kingdom of God; therefore, we do God's work. And this work must go beyond our own strength. When we are always standing at the point that exceeds our limits, heaven will help us. That is faith.
author: CHJN

text: As workers of duty we must love ALL members, we should not exclude anyone but learn to contain even the 'uncontainable'.
author: CHJN

text: Another day has started which is a day closer where we can be with God. This also means we have less time and opportunities to be transformed as well. I really hope we can put in the effort to enter the hope together.
author: CHJN

text: No matter how lacking I may be, if I hear God's gospel and sincerely try to do everything faithfully and properly, God will see that effort and will renew me.
author: CHJN

text: What is more important to God? Not that you are already perfect, but that you desire to get better. Even if you score 50% or 60%, God is not disappointed if your heart is set on growing. The foundation of our relationship with God is not perfection, but love. The willingness to keep trying, to want to improve. That desire to be better is what delights God, because it means you are walking with Him.
author: CHJN

text: Just like wheat is sifted again and again, it is through a lot of discipline we become eternal wheat as kingdom priests.
author: CHJN

text: Eternal life depends on our habits. Those who can conquer their habits with the Word are those that can have eternal life. If you want eternal life, change your habits. Anyone can dream about having eternal life, but what turns that dream into eternal life are diligent habits.
author: CHJN

text: If you feel weak and don't know what to do, the best thing to do is to pray before the Lord and ask Him to enable you. Ask for His help because you cannot do it on your own. It is through this humble approach that heaven will provide assistance.
author: CHJN

text: There were times I wanted to return to my ordinary past life, but the vow I had written in blood, promising to dedicate my life, held me together. Even after scrutinizing the 66 books of the Bible multiple times, I could not deny the reality that was unfolding before my eyes.
author: CHJN

text: We must know that the world will be inhabited only by the people of God, give thanks to God starting from the person that evangelized you, and you must also bear fruit to repay the grace you received.
author: CHJN

text: We do not have the ability, but God has an Army of Angels who have the ability. They will come and help and Heaven will protect those who work.
author: CHJN

text: Unity is a shortcut to victory.
author: CHJN

text: What heaven can trust is only Shincheonji, the one Shincheonji can trust is only God. The only God we must believe in is God.
author: CHJN

text: When I was trained in the army, my army-like mindset became completely straight. Even someone ignorant like myself really impressed the eyes of many people after being trained. Just like this, one must also become a very smart person, as well as make all those one is responsible for smart as well.
author: CHJN

text: I couldn't even breathe properly, but I went because it was the work of God. If I was calculating about my family and personal affairs, how could I do the work of God? What would happen to the work of God? I had to think about that.
author: CHJN

text: A priest is a leader and has the duty to renew and heal humanity. Thus, we must not be satisfied that I myself have been saved, but through the grace of us receiving salvation, we must carry out the work of saving others.
author: CHJN

text: I hope that you can fix and change so that we can enter the hope together. If you were thinking of someone else as you were reading this, this is a big misunderstanding. It is I. Myself. I hope that there isn't anyone who only thinks about someone else's speck of dust but cannot reflect on themselves.
author: CHJN

text: You are my precious treasure, my first-fruit. I will not trade you or compare you with anything the world can offer. Do not forget, that from the starry sky I keep my guard over you. Do not forget, that wherever you are my gaze always follows. I love you, I bid you be victorious, until the day you and I meet face to face.
author: CHJN — God's letter on behalf of God

text: We are making effort in order to obtain something 'great' through something 'small'. If we did not have God or hope, then there would be no one in the world more pitiful than us. But because God is together with us and all the words of God are correct, we will become those who receive the greatest blessing in the world. We must work with this kind of firm, determined faith.
author: CHJN

text: We all must do what is 'good' in God's eyes, and we all must do the work that 'I' myself must do. No matter what we do or say, we must first pray in front of God. Rather than doing it on our own, things will turn out better if we do it within God.
author: CHJN

text: Executives must take the lead in work, always thinking far ahead. They should pray, 'May You grant me the same quickness of mind, wisdom, knowledge, and understanding that You gave Daniel, so that I may do Your work well.'
author: CHJN

text: To The Members of Shincheonji, I keep you in my prayers that God can help you in the world. Please help one another with words and encourage one another all the time. If we always try to support one another, God will see our hearts and give a helping hand. Let's strive for unity and working toward one goal.
author: CHJN

text: Do you know how much the angels of Heaven love all of you? Don't ever forget that they are always protecting you, walking along beside you, and are with you always. Believe this and let's pray day and night.
author: CHJN

text: And prayer is very, very important. So, pray unceasingly throughout the day, but especially, at the end of the day.
author: CHJN

text: As Jesus, the prophets and apostles were — No, you must be even less caught up in private and personal matters than they were and become public figures.
author: CHJN

text: "Do you know how much the angels of Heaven love all of you? Don't ever forget that they are always protecting you, walking along beside you, and are with you always. Believe this and let's pray day and night." - CHJN🌱
author: CHJN

text: 🌳To The Members of Shincheonji, I keep you in my prayers that God can help you in the world. Please help one another with words and encourage one another all the time. If we always try to support one another, God will see our hearts and give a helping hand. Let's strive for unity and working toward one goal. - CHJN
author: CHJN

text: 🌸Words of life 🌸 Opportunities and time will not always be available. We must fulfill the entrusted duty before the time is over. If you have seen the work, think like lightning on how you can accomplish that work. ~ CHJN 🌳
author: CHJN

text: But since it says it bears fruit, then to bear fruit, we have to teach, right? We have to gather people.From now on, this is the only time we have to work. A little later, everything will be finished. So we should see this moment as our opportunity to work. Later, when judgment begins, such opportunities will disappear. Therefore, at this point, let’s all fulfill the duties entrusted to us. Yes, that’s what we must do. ~CHJN🌳🌳 ﻿
author: CHJN

text: “The spirit of the martyrs is the spirit that gave up worldly things and sacrificed life for the will of God.When that spirit is with us, our hearts shift from living for ourselves to living for God.What we must do is prepare our hearts so that the spirit can work freely within.A heart filled with one’s own thoughts, pride, and emotions has no room for the spirit to dwell. We must remove the stones and thorns in our hearts—resentment, comparison, complaints, and fear—so that the spirit can move freely.” CHJN 🌳
author: CHJN
